# Visual list -- demo_report_area (spec 123 US2 fixture)

Each visual: its type, the business question it answers, and the ONE approved
metric contract it binds to. No visual is emitted without a backing approved
contract (no orphan).

| visual_id | visual_type | business_question | bound_contract |
|-----------|-------------|-------------------|----------------|
| v01 | card | q1 headline sales | DemoSales |
| v02 | card | q2 transaction volume | DemoCount |
| v03 | bar | q1 sales by category | DemoSales |
